audit_trail.name: Color Space Conversion
audit_trail.description: Converted the input BGR image to grayscale.

audit_trail.name: Bilateral Denoising Filter
audit_trail.description: Applied bilateral filter to remove paper grain and compression artifacts while preserving edge sharpness.

audit_trail.name: CLAHE Contrast Enhancement
audit_trail.description: Evened out lighting and boosted faint ink strokes using Contrast Limited Adaptive Histogram Equalization.

audit_trail.name: Adaptive Gaussian Binarization
audit_trail.description: Converted enhanced image to crisp black-and-white to eliminate water stains and yellow aging gradients.

audit_trail.name: OCR Confidence Annotation
audit_trail.description: Calculated spatial coordinates of each recognized word and color-coded bounding boxes by Tesseract accuracy ratings.

audit_trail.name: Morphological Layout Segmentation
audit_trail.description: Dilated character boundaries using morphological spacing kernels to isolate paragraphs, tables, and structural sections.
